user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Tesla
Product type: Model S electric sedan
Tone: innovative, premium, futuristic
Visual style: Sleek, minimalist design with high-contrast lighting emphasizing modernity and cutting-edge technology.
Conceptual technique: technology-driven experiential storytelling
Format: image

brief.visual_style: Sleek, minimalist design with high-contrast lighting emphasizing modernity and cutting-edge technology
brief.headline: Drive the Future Today
brief.subheadline: Tesla Model S – Where Innovation Meets Elegance
brief.body_copy: Experience the perfect fusion of cutting-edge technology and luxurious design. The Tesla Model S redefines what an electric sedan can be – delivering unparalleled performance, advanced autopilot features, and an eco-friendly drive without compromise.

visual_direction.composition: A sleek Tesla Model S positioned in a dimly lit urban environment with sharp, high-contrast lighting highlighting its aerodynamic contours and electric blue accents.
visual_direction.color_palette: Monochrome with accents of electric blue and silver to convey sophistication and innovation.
visual_direction.lighting: Focused, high-contrast lighting creating dramatic shadows and reflections to emphasize the car’s futuristic design details.
visual_direction.imagery_elements: Incorporate subtle digital elements like flowing light trails or holographic HUD projections around the vehicle to suggest advanced technology and the immersive experience of driving a Tesla.
visual_direction.typography: Clean, sans-serif font with light weight, minimalistic placement to maintain the premium aesthetic without distraction.
